title: Mace Utils
description: This mod let's you automatically use Mace (Elytra Mace included).
body:
# Mace Utils
This mod lets you automatically use mace with elytra & more.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iLGn21s4754" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#### To prevent from using that as an exploit, mod will be disabled immediately if you're not in single-player world (realms, third-party servers, opened worlds).
This is my first actual project sooo.... I don't know if I will continue adding stuff... :(

**Best usage: Single-Player shenanigans / TikTok or YouTube content.**
